name: Family Inc.
summary: Family Inc. engages in the retail of imported new cars and used cars in Japan. It is also involved in the sale of car supplies and parts; car rental and maintenance, and metal sheet painting activities; and non-life insurance agency, solar power generation, and condominium leasing businesses. The company offers products and services through its network of 30 stores. Family Inc. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan.
